{# Overrides the sphinx-book-theme article header buttons. Upstream always appends a theme (color-mode) switcher and a search button here, but we render both in the top navbar (see navbar_end in conf.py), so they would appear twice. This copy keeps the configured header buttons (edit / repo / issues) and the in-page TOC toggle, and drops the duplicate color-mode switcher and search button. #} {% from "../macros/buttons.html" import render_funcs with context %}
{%- for button in header_buttons -%} {% set btype = button.get("type") %} {% set bopts = button.copy() %} {% set _ = bopts.pop("type") %} {{ render_funcs[btype](**bopts) }} {%- endfor -%} {% include "toggle-secondary-sidebar.html" %}
